body: Brad is out of the office until this afternoon - I will ask him then.
body_html: Brad is out of the office until this afternoon - I will ask him then.

subject: FW: Jane Doe
body:
Brad –

In your answers to ROGS, you list Milton Center for girls as facility that Jane Doe attended. Milton Center is a Department of Juvenile Justice facility; therefore I will need to get her records from DJJ. DJJ will not release the records without a signed release by Jane Doe. I have attached a general HIPPA release for your review. Would you please have Jane Doe sign it? DJJ does not have a standard form.

Also, will you agree to one more week on Responses to Net Wirth ROGS??

Please let me know.

Jess –

***
**Jessica Cadwell, CP, FRP**

*Certified Paralegal*

*Florida Registered Paralegal*

**BURMAN CRITTON LUTTIER & COLEMAN, LLP**

515 N. Flagler Drive

Suite #400

West Palm Beach, FL 33401

Tel: ███████████ / Fax: ████████████

Email: ██████████████████████
body_html:
Brad –

In your answers to ROGS, you list Milton Center for girls as facility that Jane Doe attended. Milton Center is a Department of Juvenile Justice facility; therefore I will need to get her records from DJJ. DJJ will not release the records without a signed release by Jane Doe. I have attached a general HIPPA release for your review. Would you please have Jane Doe sign it? DJJ does not have a standard form.

Also, will you agree to one more week on Responses to Net Wirth ROGS??

Please let me know.

Jess –
